coreJobStatement: Design and manufacture pump systems that convert mechanical shaft energy into controlled fluid flow at specified pressure, throughput, and efficiency for industrial process applications
productJobStatement: Help Precision-formed steel profile blanks [L5, Material & Blank Procurement] to supply precision-dimensioned steel section blanks for pump rotor internals, crescent inserts, shaft sections, and vane profiles - within specified dimensional tolerance, surface hardness, and material certification - as ready-to-machine inputs for subsequent OEM rotor machining and pump assembly
anchorLevel: L4 (component/subsystem within L5 Precision-formed steel profile blanks under L6a)

segments.name: High-volume continuous process (oil & gas, chemicals, water)
segments.characteristics: Long-interval PM; uptime-critical; multi-year supply contracts
segments.circumstance: Long-interval preventive maintenance; uptime-critical; multi-year supply contracts

segments.name: Precision metering / dosing (food & pharma, laboratory)
segments.characteristics: Flow accuracy per revolution; hygienic or clean-room constraints
segments.circumstance: Flow accuracy per revolution; hygienic or clean-room constraints

segments.name: High-pressure hydraulic OEM
segments.characteristics: High differential pressure; frequent duty cycles; compact packaging
segments.circumstance: High differential pressure; frequent duty cycles; compact packaging

segments.name: New platform designer
segments.characteristics: Pump OEM creating a new product line; needs custom rotor geometry qualified from scratch
segments.circumstance: Needs custom rotor geometry qualified from scratch

segments.name: Aftermarket / MRO
segments.characteristics: Replacement rotor packs for installed base; interchangeability with OEM drawing; short lead-time
segments.circumstance: Interchangeability with OEM drawing; often short lead-time

alternatives.name: Ground/turned round bar stock (CNC-machined to rotor geometry)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 50-70% material removal in machining; high machining cost; no geometry advantage for non-round cross-sections; unlimited availability. Dominant ~60% share.

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn / cold-rolled near-net-shape profiles (ZOLLERN)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week die lead time for new geometry; ~100 kg min batch; steel-only; limited to constant 2D cross-section. ~15-25% share.

alternatives.name: Forged steel blanks
alternatives.tradeoffs: Forging tooling EUR 10-50K; min lot sizes larger than profiles; lead time 8-16 weeks; better for 3D geometries. ~15-25% share.

alternatives.name: Powder metal (sintered) blanks
alternatives.tradeoffs: Porosity limits high-pressure applications; dimensional tolerance requires post-sinter grinding; limited to smaller cross-sections. ~5% share.

alternatives.name: Do nothing / continue with existing supplier (status quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero switching cost, zero qualification burden - most common competitor. Only displaced by cost, quality failure, or supply disruption at incumbent.
